title: Department Manager Vacancy at Walmart India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Walmart India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Walmart India in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Walmart India:
Walmart India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walmart India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
